top_signals.title: Eisenheim Takes the Helm at Shipbuilder Neptun Werft
top_signals.summary: A leadership transition is underway at Neptun Werft, and Leif Eisenheim will become Managing Director and CEO of the Rostock-Warnemünde shipbuilding company, part of the Meyer Werft Group, effective December 1, 2026, or earlier if possible.Eisenheim succeeds Stephan Happe…

top_signals.title: Reintjes Posts Record Year, Eyes Hybrid and Electric Market Growth
top_signals.summary: German marine propulsion gearbox manufacturer Reintjes reported another record year in 2025, extending a growth streak that has seen the company nearly double revenue over the past four years.The Hameln-based company generated group revenue of approximately €138 million in 2025…
